creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thibault Jouan from comment #84)

Patch applies cleanly here against head via: patch -p0

Builds cleanly against 13.0 and 12.3

My next task: build againt the list of ports which depend upon devel/ruby-gems

If that succeeds, do we agree to commit?

I have approval from ruby@ (via zi) to proceed after clean compiles.
